evals.prompt: I need a Port dashboard plugin that shows entities from our `service` blueprint in a compact table. The blueprint identifier must come from a custom plugin param `blueprintId`, not hard-coded. Use the SDK, respect page filters, and match Port theming. Output the key files and how I build to a single HTML.
evals.expected_output: Intake confirms params and mergePageFilters; implementation uses usePortPluginData, applyThemeCss, mergePageFilters; no localStorage for token; webpack/single HTML mentioned; CSP-safe fetches only to portApiBaseUrl.

evals.prompt: Our Port plugin fetch to api.github.com for stars is blocked. Fix the approach under Port CSP and keep one HTML artifact under 10 MB.
evals.expected_output: Explains connect-src limits; removes or replaces third-party fetch with allowed Port API usage or inlined data; reminds 10 MB single file constraint.

evals.prompt: After `yarn build`, walk me through uploading this plugin with the official tooling and links.
evals.expected_output: Points to @port-labs/port-plugins-cli and Port docs; does not invent CLI flags; mentions verifying dist/index.html size.
